issue_summary: Support "Test*" prefix for test class names by default
javadoc_before:
/** * Regular expressions used to match against fully qualified class names. * *

Defaults to {@code "^.*Tests?$"} which matches against class names * ending in {@code Test} or {@code Tests} (in any package). */
javadoc_after:
/** * Regular expressions used to match against fully qualified class names. * *

The default pattern matches against classes whose names either begin * with {@code Test} or end with {@code Test} or {@code Tests} (in any package). */
